title: File Deletion Quiz
description: Test your knowledge about the critical role of file deletion and storage cleanup in modern web applications.

questions.question: Which Node.js method is used to delete a file from the file system?
What's the primary risk of not validating permissions before deleting a file in a web application?
options: An attacker can delete any file they want by knowing its path or ID.
It automatically generates a backup of the user's data.

questions.question: What is the recommended approach for syncing file deletion with your database?
options: Only delete the file from the database.
Only delete the file from the disk/cloud.
Delete both the file and the corresponding database record.
Never delete files once they are uploaded.

questions.question: Which command is used to delete a file from an Amazon S3 bucket using the AWS SDK?
What is an 'Orphan File' in the context of storage management?
options: A file that exists on the server's disk but has no corresponding record in the database.
A file that is corrupted and cannot be opened.
A file that was uploaded more than a year ago.
